description: Transactions — Referrals, reputation, referral UI, reputation UI

tasks.title: Transaction Service — Referrals and Reputation
tasks.prompt:
Implement the Transaction Service covering M5.1 (Referrals) and M5.2 (Reputation) as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md.

Create Snapp.Service.Transaction with:

Referral endpoints:
  POST /api/tx/referrals — create referral (verify both users are network members, create REF# + UREF# sender/receiver indexes, queue notification)
  GET /api/tx/referrals/sent — user's sent referrals (paginated)
  GET /api/tx/referrals/received — user's received referrals (paginated)
  PUT /api/tx/referrals/{refId}/status — update status (validate transitions: Created→Accepted→Completed, any→Expired)
  POST /api/tx/referrals/{refId}/outcome — record outcome (success bool, description, trigger reputation recomputation)

Reputation endpoints:
  GET /api/tx/reputation/{userId} — current reputation scores
  GET /api/tx/reputation/{userId}/history — for trending
  POST /api/tx/attestations — peer attestation (cannot self-attest, must share network)

Reputation computation (triggered by referral outcome or attestation):
  ReferralScore (40%): f(successful_referrals, recency)
  ContributionScore (30%): f(data_categories_contributed, discussion_posts)
  AttestationScore (30%): f(attestation_count, attestor_reputation_weight)
  Decay: 5% per month of inactivity
  Anti-gaming: detect reciprocal attestation rings (flag, don't auto-reject)

Dockerfile + docker-compose (snapp-transaction, port 8086). Kong route: /api/tx/*.

Integration tests: create referral, track status, record outcome, verify reputation computation, verify attestation, verify anti-gaming detection.
tasks.done_when: Transaction service runs. Referrals tracked with lifecycle. Reputation computed from actual transactions. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Referral UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement referral UI using MudBlazor as specified in M5.3.

1. Pages/Referrals/List.razor (/referrals):
   - MudTabs: Sent | Received
   - MudList of ReferralCard components
   - MudButton 'New Referral'

2. Pages/Referrals/Create.razor:
   - MudDialog or page: MudSelect Network, MudAutocomplete Receiver (search network members), MudTextField Specialty, MudTextArea Notes
   - Submit → POST /api/tx/referrals

3. Components/Transaction/ReferralCard.razor:
   - MudCard: sender/receiver names, specialty, MudChip status badge (Created=Info, Accepted=Warning, Completed=Success, Expired=Default)
   - MudExpansionPanel for details: notes, outcome
   - MudButton actions: Accept (receiver), Record Outcome (either party)

4. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Referral list, create, status updates, outcome recording all work with MudBlazor. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Reputation UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement reputation UI using MudBlazor as specified in M5.4.

1. Components/Transaction/ReputationBadge.razor:
   - Compact MudChip: score (0-100) with color gradient (red→yellow→green)
   - MudTooltip: breakdown of three sub-scores
   - Used in ProfileCard, member lists, referral cards

2. Pages/Profile/ReputationDetail.razor (or section within profile):
   - Three MudProgressLinear bars: Referral, Contribution, Attestation scores
   - MudChart Type=Line: OverallScore history
   - MudList: recent attestations received
   - MudButton 'Request Attestation' (generates a link/request to a peer)

3. Integrate ReputationBadge into existing ProfileCard component.

4. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Reputation badge renders in profiles. Detail page shows breakdown and history. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 11 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 11. Run all tests. Walkthrough: create referral between two users, accept, record outcome, verify reputation scores update, view reputation on profiles. Write .claude/reports/sprint-11-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Referral and reputation system works end-to-end. Validation report written.
